title: Remove and replace adhesive attached components on vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove and replace adhesive attached components on vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove and replace adhesive attached components on vehicles

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Removal and replacement information for adhesive attached components is sourced and interpreted from manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Mouldings and decals are sourced and inspected for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are identified and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and removal and replacement procedures are identified to prevent damage to vehicle

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Removal and replacement information for adhesive attached components is sourced and interpreted from manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Mouldings and decals are sourced and inspected for quality1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are identified and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned and removal and replacement procedures are identified to prevent damage to vehicle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove and replace adhesive attached components on vehicles

elements.title: Remove adhesive attached components on vehicles

pcs.text: Removal of adhesive attached components is completed using approved equipment from manufacturer, including hot air guns2.2 Reusable adhesive attached components are inspected and cleaned in preparation for replacement2.3 Work is completed according to safety and environmental requirements and without causing damage to system and components, including adhesive attached components

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove adhesive attached components on vehicles

elements.title: Attach adhesive components on vehicles

pcs.text: Components to be replaced are checked and confirmed to be within manufacturer specifications3.2 Adhesive is selected and applied according to product specification3.3 Attached components are checked for fit and alignment, and to ensure that they are free of air bubbles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Components to be replaced are checked and confirmed to be within manufacturer specifications3.2 Adhesive is selected and applied according to product specification3.3 Attached components are checked for fit and alignment, and to ensure that they are free of air bubbles?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Attach adhesive components on vehicles

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
